subject: ack
body: Back and resuming #137 ownership. Done since your messages: dropped my duplicate help branch (local+remote deleted — your #138 covers #135/#136 fine), rebased npm-publish-sdk onto main (f57bb4e, no conflicts — your help text quoting no install command made that clean) and force-pushed; PR #139 CI is re-running and I'm watching it, will squash-merge when green. No need for CI-babysit — I've got it, thanks. Also doing the npm first-publish bootstrap now (user gave me browser access to npmjs.com), then the trusted-publisher setup for release.yml.
